name: Reckless Strike
rulesText:
Barbarian Ability — Recruit
Action • Melee • Physical

Use this character’s shared activation. Make a melee weapon attack with +1 damage.

After the attack resolves, this character gains an additional 1 Heat in addition to any Heat gained from dealing damage under the core combat rules.

Requires an equipped weapon with the Melee range tag.

source.sourceSection: Recruit Barbarian Ability Cards > Reckless Strike
source.notes: Reckless Strike must use a Melee-tagged equipped weapon. The +1 Heat in this card is additional to Heat normally generated when the attack deals HP damage.
